labeling_rule.block: fresh obituaries / death notices / mourning pieces whose PRIMARY purpose is to mark a specific person's recent death
labeling_rule.keep: memorial events, anniversary/commemoration pieces, legacy tributes, laws or programs prompted by a death, and any story that merely mentions death
labeling_rule.rationale: Belonging (living heritage) and Discovery (historical context) are wanted lenses; blocking commemoration would be self-defeating.
